summary: Single cross-channel funding-neutral long proposal with no integrity issues; standard advisory monitoring applies.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All four novel_dim fields (funding band, taker_buy_ratio_5m, liquidity_bucket) are point-in-time at T0 with no forward_*, post_event_*, or confirm_after_* references. taker_buy_ratio_5m is a trailing 5m window ending at T0, not a forward window — clean.
risk_assessments.multitest_inflation_notes: 60 cross_channel archetypes already exist, but funding-neutral conditioning is structurally novel within that family; marginal FWER contribution is small relative to the 523-archetype registry.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: Long-side cross-channel rule could co-fire with the user's live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long strategy on the same symbol, stacking exposure rather than opposing it. At 5–10% sizing this is a position-sizing/concentration concern, not a hedge conflict — paper-shadow monitoring item.
risk_assessments.remediation: Advisory only: during paper-shadow, log overlap windows with live pump-long strategy and cap aggregate same-symbol exposure; verify funding/taker_buy/liquidity snapshots are sourced from T0-or-earlier bars in the kernel, not the post-event window.
